import React, { useMemo, useState } from "react"; /* Reports.jsx -------------------------------------------------- Reports & Cost Analysis page Rendered INSIDE AdminLayout (layout already exists) BACKEND API CONTRACT (Future Integration): ----------------------------------------- This page should be powered by: - /api/reports/financial-summary - /api/reports/decision-effectiveness - /api/reports/department-costs - /api/reports/lifecycle-impact All values below are DUMMY JSON for UI development only. */ // ================================================== // Dummy Report Data (replace with backend APIs) // ================================================== const REPORT_DATA = { kpis: { totalCostSaved: 148000, replacementsPrevented: 312, downtimeAvoidedHours: 1840, falseClaimsDetected: 96, avgLifespanExtensionYears: 1.8, }, costComparison: { blindReplacementCost: 420000, aiOptimizedCost: 272000, }, costByRootCause: [ { label: "Hardware", value: 58 }, { label: "Software", value: 27 }, { label: "Security", value: 15 }, ], decisionEffectiveness: { approved: 412, rejected: 288, deferred: 94, accuracy: 92, }, departmentCosts: [ { department: "Manufacturing", systems: 120, requests: 84, costIncurred: 94000, costSaved: 62000, }, { department: "Finance", systems: 64, requests: 32, costIncurred: 38000, costSaved: 29000, }, { department: "R&D", systems: 98, requests: 54, costIncurred: 56000, costSaved: 41000, }, ], lifecycle: { beforeAI: 3.4, afterAI: 5.2, forecastSavings: 210000, }, }; // ================================================== // Utility helpers // ================================================== const currency = (v) => v.toLocaleString(undefined, { style: "currency", currency: "USD", maximumFractionDigits: 0, }); // ================================================== // Component // ================================================== export default function Reports() { const [range, setRange] = useState("Quarterly"); const [org, setOrg] = useState("All Organizations"); const { kpis, costComparison, costByRootCause, decisionEffectiveness, departmentCosts, lifecycle, } = REPORT_DATA; const maxCost = Math.max( costComparison.blindReplacementCost, costComparison.aiOptimizedCost ); return (
